entry.title: Analysis for Office - Logon was successful - Loading Screen
entry.content:
Hello everyone,
We are working with SAP Analysis for Office and unfortunately some colleagues cannot log in or fetch data from the server. The following window appears and stays open all the time.

Has anyone ever had this problem and is there a solution?

External consultants have advised us to select the preferred platform, this setting has already been done, but this did not solve the problem.


Many thanks and best regards,
Lorenz

entry.title: What's with SAP BTP - Q1, 2024
entry.content:
🚀 Dive into the Future of Business Technology with Us! Join our exclusive YouTube Live session where we unveil the latest innovations delivered in Q1 2024 for SAP Business Technology Platform.

Curious about what's in store? Our seasoned product experts will guide you through each innovation, offering live product demos and illustrating how these advancements translate into tangible benefits.

 In this session, we're shining a spotlight on the game-changing new vector engine in SAP HANA Cloud, the launch of the generative AI hub in SAP AI Core, and the eagerly awaited general availability of SAP Build Code. 

But wait, there's more! Don't miss out on exploring other groundbreaking innovations in our Road Map Explorer for a sneak peek into the future of enterprise technology. Mark your calendars and join us for an unforgettable journey into innovation! #SAPBTP#InnovationUnleashed #YouTubeLive https://roadmaps.sap.com/board?PRODUC... We look forward to seeing you!! 😀

 

tails: https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-sap/what-s-new-with-sap-btp-quarterly-live-series/ba-p/13573499

entry.title: Webdynpro 500 Error:Node COMPONENTCONTROLLER HUIPIAO Specified in the Mapping Is Unknown
entry.content:
Hello everyone, I face a problem about webdynpro:

I select line 1 and click button A, will pop up a list dialog, is ok , but when i close the dialog, select line 2 and click the same button A , it dump. I try to debug find the huipiao nodes LEAD_SELECTION is inital .I do not why. please save my life ....🤣

"HUIPIAO" is the popup dialog

entry.title: Re: Client Export Process- Production Client Data using DSM tool / EPI-USE method
entry.content:
Hi,

For complete non-production environments refreshes (full client copies) with client sync, How do you maintain data integrity between ALL SAP inter-dependent Systems (e.g S/4 HANA, CRM and BW)?

  • Please explain in detail the procedure to follow.
  • At the end of system refresh with client sync (full client copies), Do we need to execute tasks to retrieve delta of data since we submit the refresh in order to maintain data integrity between the systems? If yes, please explain the steps we should execute.

In my case, the source system is the production system and we cannot lock all user and stop background processes.

Thank you for your answer

entry.title: Re: Manage Equipment connectivity
entry.content:
Hi Rahul,

Thanks a lot for the help. It helps a lot. That means we dont have to use Equipment related connectivity at all. 

KR,
Sayuj.

entry.title: SAP Plant Connectivity wont connect to KepServerEX
entry.content:
Hello, 

I am Running SAP Plant Connectivity Version 15.5.4.39 as a OPC-UA Client and KEPServerEX 6 as an OPC-UA Server. They are both on a Different VM but they are in the same Subnet. Now whenever I am trying to connect my SAP PCo to the KepServer I get the Error: "Error establishing a connection: BadNotConnect". I've had this error before but was able to solve it by adding the Port of the KepServer behind the IP or Hostname of the Server on wich KepServer is installed. (like this [HOSTNAME]:[PORT]). The two servers can Ping each other so I dont think that it is a Connectivity Issue. 

Are there maybe any Settings I have to make in order to get it to work? 

Thank you for answers. 

With kind regards.

entry.title: Re: You can deactivate the VPRS (hide) by un-checking the...
entry.content:
I believe deactivating the Determine Cost indicator in Item Category definition (VOV7) will stop determination of Cost for the Item in Sales Document pricing. 

However the other functions where Cost Price of Material is needed (for example to determine COGS (Cost of Goods Sold), the Cost will still be determined based on settings in Material Master (Standard Price or Moving Average Price). 

Thanks,

entry.title: Retrieve return invoices to other tills e.g. directly from SAP CCO Manager
entry.content:
We have following problem. Our customer has SAP CCO Manager, several stores, several tills and all using as ERP System SAP BusinessOne.
One Till (lets called till_1) from store xy can NOT RETRIEVE any invoices from a certain period. That is a problem when you have return invoices and you not find invoices in till.

Now the question is: Is there a possibility to retrieve/recall receipts that have been created in till_1 to another till, lets say till_2 ? (independent of local database of till_1 where invoices originally created). So, is it possible to return invoices to all other tills regardless of where it was originally created e.g. directly from the SAP CCO Manager ?

Prod. environment: We have installed FP16, SAP Customer Checkout manager is the back-end system, Central Receipt Management is activated. All receipts posted in SAP Customer Checkout are sent to SAP Customer Checkout manager. B1 using as ERP System.

Thank you for your support and knowledge sharing!

Rozbeh

entry.title: Re: Putaway Process - Put 1 or more HUs in a Final bin
entry.content: Okay.. Thanks . Could you confirm what settings SAP recommends in case customer wants to keep multiple HUs in single bin for same product / batch combination

entry.title: Re: pessimistic lock in custom RAP based application(ODat...
entry.content:
The lock will be checked automatically as soon you go into the EDIT mode . There could 2 scenario here 

1. Managed App : If you are using managed app , the lock check will be handle by framework and it will give                                     you generic error " You can't edit this instance at the moment. It's currently locked.".

2. Unmanaged App : In your example , Manage Sales Order Version 2 i.e. an Unmanaged app , the lock                                           check has to be handled explicitly by custom logic in the lock method . You need to                                           throw the error by filling up the Failed and Reported Structure and it will be shown                                             automatically on the screen .

BDEF : R_SALESORDERTP

entry.title: Re: SAP Plant Connectivity wont connect to KepServerEX
entry.content:
Hi,
Normally the PCo should be installed in the same server of the Machine or Kepware. 
1. But you could first try to open the port of the VM where Kepware is installed.
2. Also check the whether the authorization is done properly between PCo and Kepware. To check this you can see the user authorization in Kepware and also check the certificate in the rejected certificates of Kepware. 

 

Please check the above config.

KR,
Say.

entry.title: How to create a new Reason Code?
entry.content:
How to define a Reason Code?

entry.title: Re: How to create a new Reason Code?

Hi SAP Community, 

 

In order to Define Reason Codes please follow the steps in the SAP Help Portal Documentation page below:

Define Reason Codes

 

I hope this helps!

 

Best Regards,

SAP Product Support

But I will look into your first Suggestion.

entry.title: Re: pessimistic lock in custom RAP based application(ODat...
entry.content:
Hi Amit,

Thanks for your response.

In my custom app which is unmanaged app, I have implemented the lock method & call is also going into lock method but on save button & not on edit button. When we are clicking on Edit button on object page, that time call is not going into backend to check the lock entry.

However in manage sales order app, when we are clicking on edit button, call is going into backend & giving error. Here, SAP has implemented below screenshot action in behavior projection which is getting called when we are clicking on edit button. but there is clue how they are calling this action on edit button.

Regards,

Santosh F.

entry.title: Re: pessimistic lock in custom RAP based application(ODat...
entry.content:
Hi,

 

Please review the Business Definition (BDEF) of the R_SalesOrderTP in SAP RAP. Look for the keyword 'lock master'.

To gain a better understanding, insert a breakpoint within the behavior class's lock method."

Regards,

Pradeep.

entry.title: Unlock the potential of DevOps on SAP BTP with SAP Cloud ALM
entry.content:
🔓 Unlock the Power of DevOps with SAP BTP and SAP Cloud ALM! Join us for an enlightening YouTube live session where we'll show you how these services work in tandem to unleash the full potential of your development processes and pave the way for a comprehensive DevOps setup.

In this session, we'll delve into how SAP BTP services seamlessly integrate with SAP Cloud ALM to streamline your agile workflows, enhancing efficiency and agility throughout your development lifecycle.

Whether you're a seasoned developer or new to DevOps methodologies, our expert speakers will guide you through practical insights and best practices to help you harness the transformative power of DevOps and Continuous Integration/Continuous Deployment (CI/CD), also in enterprise environments.

Don't miss this opportunity to elevate your development game and accelerate innovation within your organization. Tune in and embark on the journey towards a more agile and collaborative future! 🚀💻 #CI/CD #DevOps #SAPBTP #SAPCloudALM #YouTubeLive

 

Registration link: https://url.sap/bvqi9g

entry.title: excel to itab in rap
entry.content: Can anyone share RAP based code for uploading an excel file and then reading the data in an itab so that it is updated to custom DB table from this internal table. Need only RAP code without any extensions on UI. I have an idea that this can be achieved using large object handling as step 1 to first upload the file in xstring format, and then read the file in xstring format to convert to itab using XCO library. Has anyone implemented this and can share the exact code? Thank you !

entry.title: SAP Cloud ALM for SAP BTP Operations
entry.content:
In this session, we will provide an general overview of the existing and planned coverage for SAP BTP based SaaS and PaaS services with SAP Cloud ALM. We will provide a short overview regarding SAP Cloud ALM, introduce OpenTelemetry @ SAP as well as provide you with the existing support for the different SAP BTP use cases.

 

Registration link: https://url.sap/bvqi9g

entry.title: Re: SAP RAP application with custom action not working
entry.content: Yes , Indeed you can not update Key fields . But you can try one workaround if it is really needed, delete the exiting entry and create the entry with your new values.

entry.title: Re: SAP Plant Connectivity wont connect to KepServerEX
entry.content: Allright thank you for the Solution.

entry.title: Re: SAP Plant Connectivity wont connect to KepServerEX
entry.content: Allright thank you for the answer. Opening the Port was the Solution to the Problem. Have a Nice Day. Kind Regards

entry.title: Re: SAP Build Apps - Deployed HTML5 Web App
entry.content:
I'm experiencing the same issues, i have sent an email with a support request to buildapps@sap.com

We will also create a support ticket.

Last time SAP suggested to enable IAS in Work Zone, maybe this blog is helpful for you: https://community.sap.com/t5/sap-builders-blog-posts/what-s-new-for-sap-build-apps-enhanced-fusion-development/ba-p/13591981

After the first time we encountered the internal server error regarding the missing zone info, we added the application to workzone and access to the app was restored by accessing it through there. Now the internal server error also appears over there, but now it states "completed with status 500 Failed to exchange login token by an XSUAA token undefined"

Please let me know if you have a solution for this problem.

entry.title: Re: How to get Service/instance name
entry.content:
Hi, 

Since we are not experts on how the BTP CLI operates, we are unable to provide you with precise information on how the command "btp --format json get services/instance" retrieves the display name from the catalog. We do not have ownership of this BTP client. For further clarification and information, I recommend reaching out to the appropriate team responsible for developing and maintaining this client. They should be able to provide you with the necessary insights and assistance regarding its functionalities.

Best,
Stoyan

entry.title: Re: Cannot retrieve session with VBA
entry.content:
Hi,

apart from the question whether you have activated SAP GUI Scripting at all (see the other answers) I wonder whether you have a session at all at the time you run your script.

This command
Set session = Connection.Children(0)
can only work if you have opened a connection from SAP Logon.
SAP Logon itself does not have a scripting API - the API is basically only available for the main windows belonging to a connection and their children. Connection is the object which contains all available connections - if you have none, you will get the respective error.

If the later is the problem I advise that you first check the scripting API documentation.

Best regards,
Frank

entry.title: Re: Download internal table data in XLSX from ABAP

entry.title: Merging Customer & Vendor into single BP
entry.content:
Hello,

During CVI pre-conversion activity on ECC/ERP system, If we want to merge customers and vendors into single BP which are having same legal entity (address) then in customization path do we need to assign customer & vendor account group to the same BP Grouping? Not all customers & vendors from those account groups are eligible to merge into single BP.

Thank you

entry.title: Re: Easy way to create APIs in SAP using standard classes

entry.title: Re: Architecture Decisions for Transfer Price Management Capability
entry.content: Hi Mo, just wanted to add that many companies use transfer prices in SAP without both of the above solution options, that is, without parallel valuation and without PaPM. Just modeling an IC sales process with a price condition such as cost plus IC surcharge gives you already transfer pricing. Above solutions just add transparency for reporting and controlling  (parallel valuation) or planning and simulation capabilities (PaPM).

entry.title: Re: S/4 Public Cloud CBC:Event-Based Revenue Recognition...
entry.content:
Currently, in standard support is  provided for manual loss handling for EPPM projects, as indicated by usage 301. This allows you to manually record the imminent loss reserves for the onerous projects, using the maintained accounts in the SSCUI. You can enter your imminent loss reserves manually via the feature Manual Accruals in the app Event-Based Revenue Recognition - Projects. 

In the upcoming releases, we plan to introduce an automatic imminent loss handling process for EPPM projects. This future enhancement will provide an automatic calculation and posting of imminent loss reserves for EPPM projects using the cost-based POC method and revenue-based POC method. The underlying usage for this is usage 300.

entry.title: Re: What a customer COE needs to know about the transition to SAP Cloud ALM

What is the resolution?

 

Regards,

Ragavie

entry.title: Re: hey team, can i know how to see the security events l...
entry.content: As I said: "I only deduced the format from the file and SM20 display". If you need more information, ask the developers of this feature directly. In case you ask, I don't know who they are. The whole question would deserve asking the blog post author.

entry.title: Re: SAP Build App After Deployed into BTP getting Error w...
entry.content:
In Februari I received the following resolution for this issue. Maybe it helps..

I'm sorry to hear that you are having this type of issue.
Please note that we released in the last days a better integration to SAP Build Workzone.
Therefore it's necessary to do some changes es described in the following blog post under chapter "Deploying a project with backend to SAP Build Work Zone"  https://community.sap.com/t5/sap-builders-blog-posts/what-s-new-for-sap-build-apps-enhanced-fusion-development/ba-p/13591981 
You can find the description of the needed steps also in our documentation:  Visual cloud functions - Deployed Applications 

Please note that these changes are required even if you don't use a project with the Visual Cloud feature or SAP Build Work Zone!
The SAP Build Apps are deployed to the SAP Build Work Zone managed approuter and therefore these changes are needed.

entry.title: Re: process detail in SLT
entry.content: Please anyone assist here?

entry.title: Re: Email Template s/4 Hana cloud with FICA
entry.content: Thank you very much; the solution worked effectively.

entry.title: Re: Size category
entry.content: i am having the doubt if size category while i am creating db table i selected size category 1. in future no of records is more than size category i means we can change the size category in future requirements

entry.title: Re: Analysis and Recommended Settings of the Security Audit Log (SM19 / RSAU_CONFIG, SM20 / RSAU_REA
entry.content:
@basis_support_pl3_bis @ruzi It's new format of type SLGFTYP = "5" = variable-length record

See the description of this new format in my answer: https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-q-a/re-hey-team-can-i-know-how-to-see-the-security-events-l/qaq-p/13663525/comment-id/4824868#M4824868

  • SLGFTYP : Entry type
    • "q" = DDIC structure RSAUENTR2 version 1 without field SLGLTRM2
    • "2" = DDIC structure RSAUENTR2 version 2 including field SLGLTRM2
    • "5" = variable-length record

@Frank_Buchholz for information

entry.title: Re: SAP Build App After Deployed into BTP getting Error w...
entry.content:
Hi Ragavie,

I did not found any solution but once I am getting something I will send the detail steps for the same.

Regards,

Mithun

entry.title: Re: Automatic login not working with Windows AD setup in...
entry.content:
I have always used the instructions in 2629070 - How to Securely Integrate BI 4.2 or 4.3 with Windows Active Directory and SSO in Distributed Environments - Best Practices even before it was officially a KBA.  It has always worked well for me.

I haven't had to follow the steps from 3183026 - How to configure modern browsers for Windows AD SSO to BI Platform web applications (Edge, Chrome, Firefox)

entry.title: Re: Analysis and Recommended Settings of the Security Audit Log (SM19 / RSAU_CONFIG, SM20 / RSAU_REA
entry.content:
Hi team, 

I have read through the post, 

but its about 2014, I m receiving different logs.. how can i get information from my new logs.. or is there any updation you have?

5AU120240328000051002678400060B3100100000005BASIS0004S0000008RSBTCRTE000000000005B&0&A008910F235B11EB31624C68A74FB7ED6E413E59900DFD896

my query is why the log pattern differs from the blog post... Is there any changes regarding this 

 

FieldSub-fieldLengthDescription

SLGTYPE  SysLog: LIKE structure RSLGETYP
 SLGFTYP1Entry type: "q" = version 1 without field SLGLTRM2, "2" = version 2 including field SLGLTRM2
 AREA2Message area
 SUBID1Message name
SLGDATTIM  Time stamp (CHAR 16)
 DATE8Date in format YYYYMMDD
 TIME6Time in format hhmmss
 DUMMY2not used
SLGPROC  SysLog: LIKE RSLGPID structure
 UNIXPID5Process ID
 TASKTNO5Task
 SLGTTYP2Process type (short form)
SLGLTRM 8Terminal name (truncated)
SLGUSER 12User name
SLGTC 20Transaction
SLGREPNA 40Program
SLGMAND 3Client
SLGMODE 1External mode of an SAP dialog
SLGDATA 64Variable message data
SLGLTRM2 20Terminal name (continued), only available if SLGFTYP=2

3838A9EC16B543B2CB39003

this is the log i am getting..

but in the post the mentioned log likes 

2AU520130409010803000505200009D9a234ba.pDOKUSTAR SAPMSSY1 0201R&0 h020co.pt.com

entry.title: Re: Table control modifications do not show up
entry.content:
Check the table control in statements such as

  • definition : CONTROLS <tc> TYPE TABLEVIEW USING SCREEN <dynpro>
  • refresh : REFRESH CONTROL <tc> FROM SCREEN <dynpro>.

Insure any defined display variant (TCVIEW) is also updated (click update function during maintenance or use report RSTCXADJ)

The Frankiln Institute has been a tech hub since I was small. Even the 30th Street Amtrak Station is a beautiful structure.

entry.title: Re: hey team, can i know how to see the security events l...
entry.content: Thank u for ur support @Sandra_Rossi

entry.title: S/4HANA 2020: Missing Functionality in Fiori - Header Texts in PR (F1643 ; F1643A ; F2229)
entry.content:
Introduction

Below you can find some details that it is important to check the availability of known standard functions (like header texts in PR) in S/4 releases. In this case in 2020 the functionality is not existing. 
At later stage you can find this function in the same fiori apps (see details below):

 

Create Purchase Requisition (ME51n)
--> you can see the HEADER TEXT is there

S/4HANA 2020

In SAP S/4HANA 2020 there are two main fiori apps to create a Purchase Requisition. 

BOTH apps do not have the possibility to add HEADER TEXTS. 

  1. Create Purchase Requisition  (F1643)

     

  2. Manage Purchase Requisitions - Professional (F2229)

S/4HANA 2023
In SAP S/4HANA 2023 it is existing (please note: mabe it is existing in previous S/4HANA releases as well, but I did not check).

But header texts are ONLY existing in the app Manage Purchase Requisitions - Professional (F2229).

In the app My Purchase Requisition (F1643A) it is still not existing.

 

Conclusion

There are multiple cases where some "standard" functions are missing in fiori. In this case I was not able to find any documentation or SNOTE about it. Sometimes you can find SNOTES with some details which functions are available in which S/4HANA release.

entry.title: Re: Item category determination in SAP S/4HANA Cloud
entry.content:
Hello Varun / All experts,

There is requirement by our management for service parts, as header material will be billed and printed in invoice while other components will not be printed in invoice, But pricing, Inventory management and delivery also should be managed. In this case I suggest to use sales BOM scenario with Item category group is ERLA and Item category is TAQ (We have made customized ZTAQ). It would be worked properly OR not?

Could you please guide me on the same?

Thank you very much in advance.!

Best Regards,

Manish

entry.title: Re: New or not to the SAP Community, share your story!
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

My name is Jessy. I'm a 32 year old user assistance designer working on SAP Analytics Cloud. I've joined SAP ten year ago now, time flies... I joined fresh out of university as an intern.

I started my career working the documentation of the BI Suite, specifically Web Intelligence, and then moved on to SAP Analytics Cloud 5 or 6 years ago. It's definitely been an interesting and challenging journey so far.

Looking forward to contributing to this great community, share knowledge and learn more about our products portfolio.

Rudolf

entry.title: Re: Use Data Export Service to Replicate Data Between SAP Analytics Cloud Tenants
entry.content:
Hi @AmandaJMurphy 

Thanks for this blog. We've used this approach to successfully copy data back between our Production and Test tenants.

There is one minor issue where we receive an error message when trying to select members to use as a filter when building an OData Services query on fact data, see screenshot below. This happens for any dimension. Do you know how to resolve this issue?

Thanks,

Hugh

entry.title: Printing certain MICs only for all Inspection plans in a plant
entry.content: All of our inspection plans in our plant have the same entry on the first line of the inspection plan. I want to print only that MIC and its corresponding selected set (the text itself not the selected set code) for all materials in the plant. I tried /BAY0/AKQPLN but it only lets you print the inspection plan for one material at a time. Is there a way to print multiple materials at once?

entry.title: Re: how to post unplanned depreciation auto
entry.content:
Hi Frankbel, 

Looking at your example I would think that you could check if you have another depreciation key that is more suitable for the business need that uses base amount = APC rather than NBV.

entry.title: Re: Welcome all SAP Community members, start here!
entry.content: Great to have you here @JessyMonrose - looking forward to seeing your future interactions in SAP Community. Did you already know you can "subscribe" to the SAP Analytics Cloud managed tag? You can also browse through the existing Products and Technology blog boards and Q&A.

entry.title: Re: how to capture last year depreciation in current year...
entry.content: Can you post unplanned or manual depreciation?

entry.title: Re: Restricted ABAP and SAP S/4HANA On-Premise
entry.content:
Hello Colleagues,

setting the Default ABAP Language Version to "ABAP for Cloud Development" in a S/4HANA 2022 SP2 with SAP Basis/ABAP Version 757/75H SP2 ends up in this error message: "Parameter LSM not in version 0004 of tp configuration".
Does anybody has an idea how to solve this issue. 
Many thanks for support.
Roman

entry.title: Re: Digital Skills Initiative Applicant Guide (For self-study candidates)
entry.content:
@rochi - Invite sent! Also check out a finance-specific event that we are hosting on the Community.

@Kara_Davis - greetings from a fellow veteran. I will PM for an additional opportunity.

Invites sent as of 9 April 2024!

entry.title: Not yet received SAP digital certification badge mail
entry.content: Hi, i have cleared the SAP certification exam thr81 on 5th April 2024. However have not yet received my digital badge mail. What should i do? Please help me.

entry.title: Automatic Matching of Invoice Reference with Bank Statement
entry.content:
Hello Friends,

We would like to automatically match Customer invoices with Bank Statement. However, we have a challenge here:

Example:

Case 1

In our MT940 statement, we have a Reference number such as RF218765500764787.

RF218765500764787- RF + 2 digit prefix + 7 digit Customer Number + 6 digit Invoice number

and we have a Reference number in Customer Invoice as last 6 digit Invoice number (in this case 764787).

Case 2: 

The only difference in Case 2 is that we have sometimes 5 digit Invoice number instead of 6 digit.

Example: In our MT940 statement, we have a Reference number such as RF21876550064787.

RF21876550064787- RF + 2 digit prefix + 7 digit Customer Number + 5 digit Invoice number

and we have a Reference number in Customer Invoice as last 5 digit Invoice number (in this case 64787)

What have we done in Customizing:

We have created two Search Strings (one to find 6 digit Reference number and another one to find 5 digit Reference number)

And it is also working fine in the test.

Example:

Challenge:

We have following challenges:

1. When the system tries to clear the documents, it searches for both 5 digits and 6 digits Reference Number. So, that is why the system is unable to identify which Reference number to consider for clearing.

How can we resolve this ?

2. Sometimes, we also have two different documents with same Reference Number.

Again the system is unable to identify which Document to consider for clearing.

In this case, how can we include Customer number or Amount for search along with Invoice Reference in Search Engine ?

Thank you in advance.

Best Regards,

Saurabh

entry.title: Re: My catalog does not appear in fiori launchpad
entry.content: hello greg, thanks for replying. what i did was to login with a user to the sap gui and then start the trx ' /ui2/flpd_cust ' . Once opened a google window with launchpad i started to create the catalog following a youtube tutorial, then i created the group. The person guiding the video went to the trx 'pfcg', created a role and when he looked for the catalog in the 'Menu' tab, his catalog z appeared, but in my case it did not. Best regards

entry.title: Re: SAP Cloud Platform Transport Management service generally available
entry.content: Yes, there are plans to integrate Successfactors with Cloud Transport Management. However, we don't have a concrete timeline (yet). There is a fair chance that we will start working on the topic in the second half of 2024. Please keep checking the SuccessFactors and Cloud Transport Management roadmaps regularly.

entry.title: Re: CAP Java - Destination - Proxy Configuration
entry.content:
Hi @Moritz__,

1) Do you have an instance of "Connectivity Service' created and bound to your application.

Documentation states that this is mandatory in order for the proxy type to be determined properly:
https://sap.github.io/cloud-sdk/docs/java/features/connectivity/on-premise#cloud-foundry-to-on-premise

2) Do you have the following on your application class as described by the documentation below:

https://sap.github.io/cloud-sdk/docs/java/getting-started#framework-integration

 

@ComponentScan({"com.sap.cloud.sdk", <your.own.package>})
@ServletComponentScan({"com.sap.cloud.sdk", <your.own.package>})

 

3) Did you configure your Cloud Connector with a 'Location'?

Can you check that it is really connecting to the correct sub-account on the cockpit?
If you open your cockpit under menu Connectivity, there is a 'Cloud Connectors' menu.
Once opened, you will be able to see which Cloud Connectors are active and what is their configuration: like ACL and Location IDs.

Usually, you don't set up a Location ID for a Cloud Connector, unless you have multiple connections into the same sub-account.
Which means that a Destination with the same name can connect to different backend systems, simply by modifying the Location ID during the connection.

If location is not something you would be using for multiple CC's, then I would remove the location id entirely from the CC setup and try again.

Whenever an external call has to be made, there are two options for your application:

1) Connect to the outside world via an internal http proxy: this is done automatically by the application when it goes to the internet

2) Forward the request to a Cloud Connector: this is done for all destinations that are marked as 'On-Premise'. Which means it shouldn't use any proxy configuration.
I guess that the error for the HTTPClient is misleading. It is probably being thrown at the moment it tries to open an http socket with the resource, but since it isn't found at your sub-account, it assumes that you don't have any means (proxy) to reach the resource. This might be happening because the application is not finding any CC available that can handle the request - probably due to the 'location' being set on the CC. Chances are that it is finding a connected CC, but it is not the one that it is supposed to be used for this connection. 

If after reviewing bindings and your CC setup, this is still not working, it might be some issue with BTP or Cloud SDK. Then I would open a ticket at SAP Support channels for further investigation.

BTW: Did you know you can connect to an OData end-point using Cloud SDK the following way (instead of retrieving an http client yourself):

https://developers.sap.com/tutorials/s4sdk-odata-service-cloud-foundry.html#fa798bc1-f35a-4dc5-862e-020f2296c89e

Best regards,
Ivan

entry.title: When I enter the position in the system, it loads twice in Success Factors
entry.content:
Hi Experts, 

I'm facing a weird behavior in our system. When I select the position during "Job change" the system loads the position information the 1st time and in a 2nd time the system erase the position.

I've tried to check if there are any rules causing this. Association can cause this?

Have you ever experienced anything like this, or do you have any tips? I'm evaluating the existing rules.

Regards

#successfactors

entry.title: Re: PDF Digital Signature with BTP SAP Forms Service by Adobe and Test with Postman
entry.content:
Hi, Ramon,

Theoritically, it is possible.  Every employee has prepared a private key with password owned by her/his self . Develope an application which involve a workflow with a PDF attachment .  When the employee click a button to sign the PDF, the application will use employee private key to sign the PDF and upload the PDF into BTP SDM . But how to control the Private key in Adobe service is some process controlled by manual .

Best regards!

Jacky Liu

entry.title: Re: Automatic login not working with Windows AD setup in SAP BI 4.3
entry.content: To confirm your settings use KBA https://userapps.support.sap.com/sap/support/knowledge/en/3312900

entry.title: Re: How to check Netweaver version on SAP Java system ?
entry.content:
You have several ways to do it.

1º Open the Start Page of the JAVA instance on your browser and click on "System Information", then enter your credentials and change to the TAB named "Component info".

To know which kernel version/patchlevel are you running, you need to go to the Operating System and go to the folder "/usr/sap/<SID>/<instance_nr>/exe" and execute the program "disp+work" without any parameter.

entry.title: Re: Deployment of Fiori application to CF: Issue with metadata/Odata calls
entry.content: @KarthikBabu_pulluru please follow the guidelines and stop tagging people on your questions!!

entry.title: Re: DI API add purchase invoice based on landed cost

entry.title: Re: How to check Netweaver version on SAP Java system ?
entry.content:
Hello mamartins,

Thank you for you reply !Is the first step enough to know if I'm in Netweaver version 7.5?

Regards,

entry.title: Re: SAP Cloud Platform Transport Management service generally available
entry.content:
There is also an improvement request on that topic (maybe created by you): https://influence.sap.com/sap/ino/#idea/319925

It would make sense to upvote this idea, so that the topic also moves up in our backlog.

entry.title: In SAP B1, is it possible to run Depreciation run job via DI API or Service Layer?
entry.content: Is it possible to run depreciation run for fixed assets module via DI API or Service Layer in SAP B1 SQL v10?

entry.title: Re: hey team, can i know how to see the security events l...
entry.content: "Variable length" means that a structure IS NOT POSSIBLE. A structure has fixed length. I guess your question is: "is it possible to tell SAP software to write in fixed-length format?" I don't see what could be the reason that such a possibility exists.

entry.title: Re: DI API add purchase invoice based on landed cost
entry.content:
Hi ricardo_renteria2,

We would appreciate if you can close this thread by selecting the answer.

Kind regards,

ANKIT CHAUHAN

SAP Business One Support

entry.title: Re: SAP Build Apps - Deployed HTML5 Web App
entry.content: Hello JvdS, I am also experiencing exactly the same issue. Please, if a solution to this situation is found, document the response on this blog in a detailed manner.

entry.title: Payment Batch Approval Configurations BCM SAP FI/ FSCM - S4HANA
entry.content:
Payment Batch Configuration - SAP S4Hana
Body

Definition :

A business object containing multiple payment items based on the settings of the underlying payment agreement. All payment transactions share common attributes, defined as grouping characteristics. Different combinations of attributes result in the creation of a new payment batch.

Use:

 

You use payment batches to bundle payment items for collective processing. A single outgoing payment order will be generated containing all payment items and an offsetting clearing item. The payment order will be passed to the File Handler component for payment media creation. The resulting payment message can be used internally as a payment advice (for instance, camt.54) or is sent to your house bank for processing. The payment items are posted as one total sum.

You activate the creation of payment batches and its grouping characteristics in the payment agreement. The system will apply some default grouping characteristics automatically.The posting is done with a corresponding clearing item that covers the total amount of payment items in the payment batch.

Advanced payment management uses the following types of payment batches:

Payment batch for internal payment items => Used to group recipient items, originator items, clearing items to post them later in a compressed form to an internal account as one total sum. This is usually done togehter with a payment advice generation, using an output format conveter, such as camt.54.

Payment batch for external payment items => Used to group recipient items to process them collectively. All payment transactions will be passed in one payment media to your house bank.

You can assign similar payment items to the same payment batch, for example, payment items with the same value date, processing date, due date and direct debit type, or of the same payment item type. The grouping criteria depend on your processing needs but you must consider the output media format characteristics.

Setting Up Payment Batches :

Prerequisites: 

The following pre-requisites are required to go ahead with the configuration for payment Batch approval

1.Business Function FIN_FSCM_CLM is active 

Depending on your license, you can use a basic scope of  Cash and Liquidity Management  or  or a full scope of this solution capability. This business function must be activated in order to switch on the full scope of this solution capability.

Technical NameTechnical Name of Business FunctionFIN_FSCM_CLM

Type of Business Function

Enterprise BF

Available From

SAP S/4HANA, on-premise edition 1511

Application Component

FIN-FSCM-CLM

Required Business Function

Not relevant

Transaction Code : SFW5  

 

 

In the General settings for cash management Cash scope should be Full Scope.

Transaction Code : SM30

 

Table/View : FCLM_CONFIG2)

Click On New Entries :

 

Activate Full Scope

 

 

The configuration for Payment Medium Workbench is in place which includes Configuration in the following Transaction Code.

  1. FBZP
  2. OBPM1
  3. OBPM2
  4. OBPM3
  5. OBPM4
  6. DMEEX

BCM module is activated in the system.

Transaction Code : SFW5  


SAP_WFRT user ID is created. The user ID should have the “SAP All or All RFC authorizations” role assigned.

Transaction Code : SU01

Workflows are activated :

Transaction Code : SWU3

Define Settings for Bank Account Master Data

Go to SPRO >Financial Supply Chain Management > Cash and Liquidity Management > Bank Account Management > Basic Settings > Define Settings for Bank Account Master Data

 

Account Type Definition:

This setting is required for the migration of house bank accounts .Define different types of accounts to suit different business purposes. Account types can be used as an analysis dimension in reporting and planning. If the bank account contract type is enabled, you must specify a bank account contract type for each account type. Unlike account types which can be defined freely by users, bank account contract types are predefined by SAP. You can define one or more account types for each bank account contract type.

To add a new bank account type, choose New Entries and then specify the following:

  1. Type: Enter a unique type ID no longer than 10 characters.
  2. Description: Enter a short description for the account type, for example, current account.
  3. Attribute: Specifies whether the bank account is an operating account or a functional account.
  4. Operating accounts are bank accounts that are used for daily business transactions, such as receiving incoming payments and issuing outgoing payments.-
  5. Functional accounts are bank accounts that are used in other financial activities, such as loan, investment, and fund raising.

Here we have to create the Bank Account types, by default there are account types. This account type would be used in the bank account master.

 

Define Payment Approval Groups:

Define different groups of authorized payment approvers to suit different business purposes. To do so, you need to have enabled the payment approval function in the Customizing activity Enable Payment Approval.

 

Define Approval Patterns

  1. In the Define Payment Approver Groups view, define a payment approver group
  2. In the Define Approval Patterns view, define patterns for payment approvals:

    = > For a sequential pattern, the payment approver groups defined in this pattern approve payments in a sequential order. You can assign up to four payment approver groups for a sequential approval pattern.

    = > For non-sequential patterns, the payment approver groups approve payments regardless of sequential order. You must assign at least two payment approver groups for non-sequential patterns. You can create non-sequential approval patterns by specifying the approval sequence as Non-Sequential.

 

Assign Approval Patterns

In the Assign Approval Patterns view, you can assign patterns to company codes and account types.

The assignment works as follows:

  1. If an approval pattern is assigned to a company code but not to any account type, then the pattern is applicable to all account types under that company code.
  2. If an approval pattern is assigned to an account type but not to any company code, then the pattern is applicable to the account type for all the company codes.
  3. If multiple approval patterns are assigned to an individual account type or company code, approval pattern priority can be defined to determine the sequence of approval patterns.

    The priority value 0 has the highest priority.

Here we assign approval patterns to the combination of Company code and Account type. I have assigned below the Pattern ZEU1 to Account type IN&OUT for my company code 7180. In case of multiple Patterns to the same combination, we can set the priority. Priority 0 (blank) takes precedence.

 

Define Automatic  Approval / Rejection.

In this setting you define the automatic actions in Bank Communication Management in case the approval list in Bank Account Management is empty, or the approval pattern cannot be defined.

Possible values:

  1. Auto Rejection when Approval Pattern not Found, or Approval List is Empty: All payment batches will be automatically rejected in case the approval list in Bank Account Management for the house bank account is completely empty or in case the approval pattern cannot be defined.
  2. Auto Rejection when Approval List is Empty: All payment batches will be automatically rejected in case the approval list in Bank Account Management for the house bank account is completely empty.
  3. Auto Approve when Approval List is Empty: All payment batches will be automatically approved in case the approval list in Bank Account Management for the house bank account is completely empty. This is the default value for the Bank Communication Management with Bank Account Management.
 
Assign the above type to your company code:

BCM Configuration:

As stated, above BCM is a part pf FSCM module in SAP. Below is the node for BCM.

Go to SPRO >Financial Supply Chain Management >  Bank Commination Management >  Basic Settings

 

Basic settings:

Go to SPRO >Financial Supply Chain Management > Bank Commination Management > Basic Settings > Basic Settings for Approval

Define the default currency and the resubmission date for payments.

Use => You can define the default currency, resubmission date, and whether or not a signature is needed for payments.

Prerequisites

Default Currency

•When a payment batch is evaluated for release (such as dual control, triple control, automatic release, and so on), the total batch amount can be evaluated based on the default currency if the payments in the batch consist of different currencies or different company code (hence different local currency).

Default resubmission date

•For resubmission of payments, the resubmission date from the current date can be set.

Sign log

•If the check box is marked, the signature popup appears before the payment batch is approved.

Click On New Entries:

 

 

Rule Maintenance:

Go to SPRO > Financial Supply Chain Management > Bank Communication Management > Payment Grouping > Rule Maintenance

Use

In this IMG activity, you can define the rules for the kind of grouping you desire for payments. Rules should be prioritized, so that when there is more than one rule satisfying the criteria for grouping, your priorities determine the batching rule. Once a rule is defined, click on the maintain button to specify the criteria for batching rules. Here all attributes of the payment are provided. Only attributes making sense for the batching rule should be double clicked and then maintained.

Activities

Make the settings you require.

Example

Suppose you define rule YCHQ_TRNSF priority 0 and YAMNT_MED priority 1. If a payment satisfies the criteria for batching, rule YCHQ_TRNSF is selected because of its higher priority.

These rules are applied to responsibilities created based on priority assigned.

 

Save rule and select the row to maintain the rules

Update rule criteria based on your requirement for the rule:

 

 


 

Additional Criteria for Payment Grouping

Go to SPRO > Financial Supply Chain Management > Bank Communication Management > Payment Grouping > Additional Criteria for Payment Grouping

Use

In this IMG activity, you can set additional criteria (apart from batching rules) such as requiring all payments of a batching rule to belong to a certain date. Two grouping fields are provided, one of which you select for the batching.

Activities

Make the settings you require.

Example

Suppose you select VALUT field for batching rule YCHQ_TRNSF. This means that if a batching rule YCHQ_TRNSF is selected, payments are further batched by the date, so all payments belonging to YCHQ_TRNSF and of the same date will form a batch.

Note: Grpng Field1 should be always HKTID for the workflow to trigger based on the signatories in the Bank Master Fiori app. The Grpng. Field2 can be as required.

Mark Rules for Automatic Payments (No Approval)

Go to SPRO > Financial Supply Chain Management > Bank Communication Management > Release Strategy > Mark Rules for Automatic Payments (No Approval)

Incase if we don’t want to trigger the approval process for certain payments, then we can create a separate rule for this purpose and check Auto payment as shown below. Then it will skip the process of batch merging, hence direct file generation.

Release strategy:

Path:

IMG > SPRO > Financial Supply Chain Management > Bank Communication Management > Release strategy > Change and release > Assign role to release steps 

In this IMG activity, you can assign a standard role to the individual release steps of the release procedure that applies for a certain release object. Processing (users, workplace, organizational units, positions and so on) is linked to the standard role. The system uses the standard role to find the processors responsible and, through the SAP Business Workflow, forwards the release object as a work item to them for processing further.

Prerequisites

You have made the settings for the corresponding release object in IMG activity Assign Release Object to Release Procedure.

Standard settings => SAP does not supply any standard roles for Bank Communication Management.

 

  1. Click on the new entries above and add “BNK_INI” as a release object. This release WF task is activated by basis and is a standard workflow that is delivered with the SAP BCM module.
  2. Select “01” from the drop-down for required release. This is your first-level approval of the dual approval workflow.
  3. Select “1” from the drop-down for the WF release step. As mentioned above this is your first step approval.
  4. Hit enter and save to generate rule number. This rule number is auto-generated in the system. Do not enter rule number manually.

 

 

create responsibility based on rules created for payment grouping above

 



Select the responsibility and click on create


Once it's saved, the status of responsibility turns from red to green. Select the responsibility and click on insert agent assignment to add the users responsible for the first level of release of the payment batch.

Additional release steps:

Path: IMG > SPRO > Financial Supply Chain Management > Bank Communication Management > > Additional release steps > Assign roles to release steps:

In this IMG activity, you can make the following basic settings for the release of a particular release object. Since the release of release objects is regulated by the SAP Business Workflow in the group frame release, you must define if and when the system forwards a release object to the release process.

This is the config for 2nd level of approver. Follow the same procedure as it was done for the first-level approver. This time only workflow task changes to “BNK_COM”

Create rule 


 

 

 

 

Once it's saved, the status of responsibility turns from red to green. Select the responsibility and click on insert agent assignment to add the users responsible for the second level of release of the payment batch

Define release procedure:

Path: IMG > SPRO > Financial Supply Chain Management > Bank Communication Management > > Additional release steps > Define Release Procedure:


In this IMG activity, you can make basic settings for the release of a particular release object. Since the release of release objects is regulated by the SAP Business Workflow, in the group frame release you must define if and when the system forwards a release object to the release process.

Prerequisites

You have made the standard settings for the SAP Business Workflow in the Basis Customizing settings by choosing Business Management -> SAP Business Workflow -> Maintain Standard Settings for SAP Business Workflow .

Standard settings

The standard setting supplied for the release objects is no release (radio button is never in the group frame release).

 

Assign workflow template to release procedure:

Path: IMG > SPRO > Financial Supply Chain Management > Bank Communication Management > > Additional release steps > Assign workflow template to release procedure:

In this IMG activity, you can assign a release workflow and a release procedure workflow to every release procedure of a release object. The release workflow realizes the technical processing of the release in the system. The release procedure workflows realize the technical processing of the various release procedures (such as the principle of treble control) in the system.

Assign the workflow template being used to release procedure.

Call transaction SM30 with view V_TBCA_RTW_LINK and check that the following entries are maintained:

BNK_COM 01 50100024 50100021

BNK_COM 02 50100024 50100022

BNK_COM 03 50100024 50100023

BNK_INI  01 50100024 31000004

Workflow templates:

  • Make sure the workflow templates and tasks are assigned as general task. If this is not maintained as general task, you will not be able to see your batch in bank monitor(BNK_MONI/BNK_MONIP). Below is the list of task type which needs to be updated/ checked:
  • In transaction PFTC_CHG, Choose 'Standard task' and for 50100025,50100026,50100066,50100075: In the menu 'Additinal data ->Agent Assignment ->Maintain, Mark as 'General' Task.


 

The following BTE should be maintained for Product BAM

Transaction Code : FIBF




Maintain the Event Type Linkage for Triggering Workflow Processes

Go to SPRO > Financial Supply Chain Management > Cash and Liquidity Management > Bank Account Management > Maintain the Event Type Linkage for Triggering Workflow Processes or Goto to transaction SWETYPV, for object type 'BUSISB001', Activate 'Linkage activated'.

Here we assign the Workflow to the Object type and event. This would be default available, just have to confirm if the Type Linkage is active.


Check the settings in transaction OBPM5.

Rejection or Resubmit Automation:

The following BADI can be used to reverse original payment documents in case of rejection or resubmit of the batches.

SAP Note Reference : https://me.sap.com/notes/1333640 

 BCM: Batch is not created

SAP Note Reference : https://me.sap.com/notes/2775848/E 

Workflow setup in new installations for BCM

SAP Note Reference : https://me.sap.com/notes/1041016/E 

Master data requirements:

Fiori Application : Manage Bank Accounts(F1366A)

Manage Automatic Payments:

Payment run process is an accounts payable process that is used to handle payments to vendors. The process is called automatic payment program.

With the transactional app Manage Automatic Payments, you can schedule payment proposals or schedule payments directly and get an overview of the proposal or payment status. The app identifies the overdue invoices and checks whether all the required payment information is complete.

The Payment Process includes the Following Steps

  • Invoices are Entered
  • Pending Invoices are analysed for due date
  • Invoices due for payment are prepared for review
  • Payments are approved or modified
  • Invoices are paid

Start fiori app “Manage Automatic Payments” and Click Create Parameter.

 

 


On the first screen, you need to enter run date and identification. In the identification field, give a five-characters alphanumeric code that will be used to identify the payment program. A combination of the run date and identification is used to identify the program in SAP system.

Fill the Run date and identification and click Create:

 

 


In the Parameters Tab, We have to define the following and Click Save
  • What is to be paid – Docs. Entered Up to
  • What payment methods will be used – Payment Methods
  • When will the payments be made – Posting Date?
  • Which company codes will be considered – Company Codes?
  • How are they going to be paid – The payment Method Sequence decides the Priority of the Payment Method
  • Enable Additional log – To get some additional log information.

 


You can see the payment parameter created :

 

 


Create Payment Proposal:

Selected the Parameter and click schedule Proposal:

 

 


When you click on Proposal the system is going to ask whether you want to create it immediately or want to schedule it for a time in the future. For this demo, we are going to run it immediately. You should tick the checkbox for creation of payment medium.

Make sure you select “Start Immediately” and then click on Schedule.

 

 


You can see the payment proposal in the respective tab.
A payment proposal is generated based on the parameters.

 


Review Payment Proposal:
  • Click on the arrow button to review the document selected in this run.
  • The system will list all the vendors that have been included in the payment proposal.
  • We can view the Proposal Log for possible errors by Pressing the Proposal Log Button.
  • We can edit the proposal to block the some payments if we want, Press the Edit Proposal Button.

 


Payment Run:

Go to Proposal and click on Schedule Payment to run Payment.

 

 


Check “Start Immediately” to start the payment run instantly and then click on Schedule.

 

 


Go to “Payments Processed” and You can see the payment posted.

We can check the status of the Payment run on the Status Tab.

 

 


You can also select the posted payment to see the log:

 



Payment Batch will get created:

 

 
Fiori Applications :

entry.title: Re: Digital Skills Initiative Applicant Guide (For self-study candidates)
entry.content:
Hello @David_Chaviano 

I am Yesim Aydin, and I can identify myself in the following categories:

- Women
- Single parents
- People in remote or underserved areas who may not have access to the same economic opportunities as their urban or more privileged counterparts
- Minorities who may not have equal opportunities in their geographical locations
- First-generation university students

For the past 2 years, I have been working as a Business Solutions Specialist in IT departments. I want to transition fully into the SAP field, where I aim to make an impact and learn about the latest trends, technologies, and developments. I hold a degree in Mathematics and Computer Science.I provided project management and end-user support in one full-cycle SAP digital transformation project. However, my consultancy training is lacking. I aim to become a proficient SAP professional.

I am eager to obtain SAP certifications, specifically in ABAP, Integration, or in modules that I am passionate about, and to leverage my education and skills to become a part of the global SAP ecosystem consisting of customers and business partners. I am currently seeking employment, and I believe that obtaining certification will facilitate this process. Additionally, I aspire to work with global companies rather than solely in my own country.

This is truly a fantastic initiative by SAP and a great opportunity for me. I look forward to hearing from you.

Best regards,
Yesim Aydin

entry.title: Re: Combine Multiple Freight orders, which belong to one...
entry.content:
Hi @gaurav_jain27 

I don't think it is possible to merge multiple freight orders into a single transportation unit in EWM. That would be against the system logic where a TU corresponds directly to a single FO.

However for parcel scenarios, where you can't create a single freight order, consider Execution-Driven Planning (Outbound) process.

Best regards

Dominik Tylczynski

entry.title: Re: Are custom tiles going to support embedded content fr...
entry.content: Being able to display web content housed on iContent would be a most excellent feature!

entry.title: Re: In SAP B1, is it possible to run Depreciation run job...
entry.content:
Hi Pipalia1,

I do not think that the table ODRN is exposed to DI API or Service Layer.

Kind regards,

ANKIT CHAUHAN

SAP Business One Support

entry.title: Re: How to check Netweaver version on SAP Java system ?
entry.content: Yes, it is!

entry.title: Re: Manage work center capacity for maintenance order
entry.content:
I am afraid, you can not view remaining capacity of the work center without RSH in S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition.

Best Regards,

Rajendra Pandey

entry.title: Unable to trigger Returns order for In-house repair
entry.content:
I am testing the in-house repair process in a vanilla S/4HANA 2022 On-prem instance.

Specically I am testing the process whereby the Return order we need in order to receive the defective item is triggered for the repair object from the Perform prechecks details apps.  When I click on Returns order the system issues the following error message:

Item Item 10: Activity "" is only allowed if the produc: Activity "" is only allowed if the product is received.

The application log has no further info other than the error number:  CX_MSR_TRC 176

I have checked the config as described under Integrate In-House Repair with Advanced Returns Management and I think the requirement are covered (as far as they were understandable to me at least)

I would appreciate any insights on how to fix this.

Thanks
